Callback Functions

Typedefs

typedef void(* VIDEO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK) (BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)
 Callback function of video capture. More...
 
typedef void(* AUDIO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK) (const BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)
 Callback function of audio capture. More...

 Callback function of video capture(Calling convention stdcall) More...
 
typedef void(__stdcall * AUDIO_CAPTURE_STDCALL_CALLBACK) (const BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)
 Callback function of audio capture(Calling convention stdcall) More...
 

Detailed Description

Typedef Documentation

typedef void(* AUDIO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK) (const BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)

#include <MWCaptureDef.h>

Callback function of audio capture.

Gets audio data
Related functions are:
MWCreateAudioCapture

typedef void(__stdcall * AUDIO_CAPTURE_STDCALL_CALLBACK) (const BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)

#include <MWCaptureDef.h>

Callback function of audio capture(Calling convention stdcall)

Gets audio data
Related functions are:
MWCreateAudioCaptureWithStdCallBack

typedef void(* VIDEO_CAPTURE_CALLBACK) (BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)

#include <MWCaptureDef.h>

Callback function of video capture.

Gets video data
Related functions is:
MWCreateVideoCapture

typedef void(__stdcall * VIDEO_CAPTURE_STDCALL_CALLBACK) (BYTE *pbFrame, int cbFrame, UINT64 u64TimeStamp, void *pParam)

#include <MWCaptureDef.h>

Callback function of video capture(Calling convention stdcall)

Gets video data
Related functions are:
MWCreateVideoCaptureWithStdCallBack
